zh.lifeSummary: 當William Nebaud於大約1295年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特時，他的父親Philip Nebaud57歲，母親Cicely Grindham18歲。他於大約1359年與Agnes Herewood在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1388年在他的家鄉享年95歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Nebaud于大约1295年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特时，他的父亲Philip Nebaud57岁，母亲Cicely Grindham18岁。他于大约1359年与Agnes Herewood在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1388年在他的家乡享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Nebaud was born about 1295, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Philip Nebaud, was 57 and his mother, Cicely Grindham, was 18. He married Agnes Herewood about 1359, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1388, in his hometown, at the age of 95.

Il a épousé Agnes Herewood environ 1359, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1388, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 95 ans.

ko.Hinton St George, Somerset, England: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 인턴 스트 조지
ko.lifeSummary: William Nebaud(이)가 대략 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip Nebaud(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Cicely Grindham(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1359년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Agnes Herewood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1388년 그의 고향에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.
